CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Bifrost** — a self-hosted smart home control hub.
Bifrost brings your supported devices — direct integrations plus anything from Home Assistant — under one web UI and REST API, organizes them into rooms, saves scenes you can restore in one tap, and lets you control everything by voice or AI assistants through the embedded MCP server. It aims to keep device connections live and show each device's real state, and ships as a single binary with one SQLite file.
This repository hosts the Unraid Community Applications template for Bifrost. Install it from the **Apps** tab, set a `BIFROST_SECRET`, and open the web UI on port 3000.
Source & issues: https://github.com/others-git/bifrost
